name: Write-skeleton-first for research agents
description: When dispatching research agents, mandate writing a skeleton file with frontmatter + section headers BEFORE any research. Fill sections incrementally. Agents told 'write as you go' (advisory) had 62.5% failure rate. Agents told 'WRITE FIRST before reading or searching' (imperative) had 100% success rate.

name: research-doc-skeleton-first
description: Write comprehensive research docs with frontmatter, executive summary, detailed ToC with internal links, code examples, comparison matrices, ASCII diagrams, and sources. Use skeleton-first: write headers and ToC before content.

name: write-skeleton-first
description: For research agents: Create frontmatter + section headers before filling content prevents scope creep and maintains focus. Create all skeletons first (2 docs + index), then fill systematically.

name: chimera-agent-wrapper-pattern
description: ChimeraAgent wraps Strands concepts with multi-tenant context (tenantId always required, sessionId generated if not provided). SystemPromptTemplate uses {{variable}} syntax for tenant/session injection. AgentCore Memory namespace follows convention: tenant-{tenantId}-user-{userId}.
